phase_banner.description: Center-top text showing current phase: 'Enemy Team Pick', 'Our Team Pick', 'Ban Phase', etc.

countdown_timer.description: Large countdown number below the phase banner. OCR this region to read remaining seconds.

our_ban_slots.description: Our team's 5 ban slots — top-LEFT corner. Slots ordered 0 (leftmost) → 4. Each is a ~52×52 px circle.

enemy_ban_slots.description: Enemy team's 5 ban slots — top-RIGHT corner. Slots ordered 0 (rightmost) → 4. Each is a ~52×52 px circle.

our_pick_slots.description: Our team's 5 pick slots — LEFT panel. Each row contains: flag, clan logo, and hero portrait icon. Hero portrait is what to crop for recognition. Ordered 0 (top) → 4 (bottom).

enemy_pick_slots.description: Enemy team's 5 pick slots — RIGHT panel. Labeled 'Player 1'–'Player 5' in-game. Hero portrait is what to crop for recognition. Ordered 0 (top) → 4 (bottom).

center_hero_display.description: Large center area showing the hero currently being hovered or selected. Crop this to identify hero before lock-in.

action_button.description: Bottom-center button area. Red = ban phase (our turn to ban). Blue/teal = pick phase. Contains 'Show First' and 'Help You Pick' buttons during pick phase.

rank_emblem.description: Rank emblem icon at the start of our team's player list (top-left of left panel).

first_pick_indicator.description: Text/icon near the phase banner indicating first-pick order.

detection_notes.ban_slot_fill_detection: A ban slot transitions from dark (empty) to bright (hero portrait visible). Compare mean luminance of the slot crop against a normalized baseline. See FrameProcessor.isSlotFilled().
detection_notes.pick_slot_fill_detection: Same luminance approach as bans. Hero portrait appears in the hero_portrait_x_abs sub-region of each row.
detection_notes.phase_detection: Sample the action_button region: red-dominant → BAN phase, blue/teal-dominant → PICK phase. See PhaseDetector.
detection_notes.timer_ocr: Crop countdown_timer region and run OCR to read remaining seconds. The number is large and white on dark background — high contrast, easy to read.
detection_notes.ban_icon_recognition: Each ban slot shows a circular hero portrait with a red X overlay when filled. Use PortraitMatcher.match() on the cropped slot.
detection_notes.orientation_warning: MLBB draft is always landscape. Do NOT apply portrait-mode coordinates — they will target the wrong screen areas.
